scores.notes: The response never actually provides the charm.py implementation — only the class name line and a descriptive table. There is no __init__, no event handler body, no socket import, and no ops.main() call. The concepts described are correct (relation_joined, writing to event.relation.data[self.unit], socket.getfqdn()), so hallucination_free scores well, but the code is entirely absent and cannot run.
